data.name: Slut Metamorphosis
data.detailed_description:
Wishlist our new game!


關於此遊戲

Slut Metamorphosis is a NTR (cheating) themed visual novel. Make choices and read through the story from both the male and female protagonist's perspective.

You are not doing well financially when an older family friend Shoji offers to help out and lets you and your girlfriend Lana live with him in his fancy home until you get back up on your feet.

What you don't know is that Shoji might have ulteriot motives with your girlfriend... As you live in Shoji's home you notice Lana's outlook on life has been changing. She's always been a fashionista who wears a lot of makeup and dyes her hair blonde with a modern look on life, but lately she seems to be adopting more traditional Japanese norms and values...

Lana is your girlfriend. Her dream is to become a popular model one day. She does not like doing household chores and pushy overly masculine men.

You are playing as Ken, a guy who recently lost his lowe paying job and has no choice but to move in with an older family friend.

Shoji is an old family friend and a wealthy entrepreneur with a beautiful Japanese home. You're not sure whether you appreciate the way he looks at your girlfriend once in a while...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any sound card
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: i3 or above
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any sound card
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
